• HTML5 game using JavaScript and MQTT for multiplayer
  • Pixel art mining game with procedurally generated maps
  • Real-time multiplayer with WebSocket/MQTT broker connections
  • Custom UI system with CSS3 bevel borders and mobile controls
  • Cloud save system using IndexedDB and Puter cloud storage
  • Sound engine with Web Audio API for mining and ambient effects
  • Shop system for upgrades and items with in-game economy
    const TILE_PROPS = { [TILE_TYPES.COAL]: { name: "Coal", color: '#2c3e50', hardness: 2, value: 10, tier: 0 } };
    class SoundManager { init() { this.ctx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } }
    class ShopSystem { buy(item) { const p = Game.localPlayer; if(p.money >= cost) { p.money -= cost; p.drillTier++; } } }

This is a browser-based multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps, real-time multiplayer networking via MQTT, and a complete in-game economy system. The game features pixel art graphics, sound effects using the Web Audio API, cloud saves through IndexedDB and Puter, and a shop system for upgrades and items.
